title: Astral to Join OpenAI
author: ibraheemdev
aiHeadline: Astral joins OpenAI, bringing more AI drama to your life because apparently, we need more of that.

title: Afroman found not liable in defamation case
author: antonymoose
aiHeadline: Afroman wins defamation case, proving that even the most bizarre legal battles can be won, probably because the case was as confusing as his music.

title: A sufficiently detailed spec is code
author: signa11
aiHeadline: Tech experts reveal that a detailed spec is basically code, because who needs actual coding when you can just write really long documentation?

title: Google details new 24-hour process to sideload unverified Android apps
author: 0xedb
aiHeadline: Google introduces a 24-hour process for sideloading unverified Android apps, because who needs security when you can have instant gratification?

title: “Your frustration is the product”
author: llm_nerd
aiHeadline: Your frustration is now the product, because apparently, that's the new trend in tech, and we're all just here to make companies richer by being annoyed.
